description: FORGE Scenario Registry — Production VFX scenarios for SYNAPSE battle-testing

scenarios.title: Create Dome Light
scenarios.description: Create a Karma dome light in LOPs with environment map, verify it exists in the USD stage with correct type and default parameters.
steps: Create a dome light LOP node
Set texture file parameter to a test HDRI path
Set intensity to 1.0
Verify the light prim exists in the stage
Verify the light type is DomeLight
scenarios.expected_outcome: DomeLight prim exists in USD stage with correct texture and intensity

scenarios.title: Create 3-Point Light Rig
scenarios.description: Create key, fill, and rim lights as distant/rect lights in LOPs. Verify all three exist with differentiated parameters.
steps: Create a distant light (key) with intensity 1.0
Create a rect light (fill) with intensity 0.5, width 2.0
Create a distant light (rim) with intensity 0.7
Set different rotations for each light
Verify all three lights exist in the stage
scenarios.expected_outcome: Three light prims in USD stage with distinct types and intensities

scenarios.title: Create MaterialX Surface Shader
scenarios.description: Create a basic MaterialX standard surface material in LOPs. Verify the material prim and its binding structure.
steps: Create a material library LOP
Create a MaterialX standard surface inside it
Set base color to (0.8, 0.2, 0.2)
Set roughness to 0.4
Verify material prim exists with correct shader type
scenarios.expected_outcome: MaterialX material prim with standard_surface shader and correct parameter values

scenarios.title: Assign Material to Geometry
scenarios.description: Create geometry in SOPs, import to LOPs, create a material, and bind the material to the geometry.
steps: Create a sphere SOP
Create a SOP Import LOP to bring geometry into USD stage
Create a MaterialX material
Assign the material to the sphere geometry
Verify the material binding exists on the geometry prim
scenarios.expected_outcome: Geometry prim has a valid material binding pointing to the MaterialX material

scenarios.title: Query Scene State
scenarios.description: Create several nodes, then query the scene to verify they exist and have correct types.
steps: Create 3 different node types (geo, light, camera)
Query the scene for all nodes
Verify each created node appears in the query results
Verify node types match what was created
scenarios.expected_outcome: Scene query returns all created nodes with correct types

scenarios.title: Render Single Frame
scenarios.description: Set up a minimal scene (sphere + dome light + camera) and render a single frame.
steps: Create a sphere geometry via SOP Import
Create a dome light
Create a camera
Set render settings (resolution, samples)
Render a single frame
Verify render output file exists
scenarios.expected_outcome: Render completes without error and output file is created

scenarios.title: USD Stage Inspection
scenarios.description: Build a simple USD stage with multiple prims and inspect it. Verify hierarchy, types, and properties.
steps: Create a scene with nested transform hierarchy
Add geometry at leaf level
Inspect the full stage
Verify prim paths match expected hierarchy
Verify property values are accessible
scenarios.expected_outcome: Stage inspection returns correct hierarchy and property values

scenarios.title: Parameter Encoding Stress
scenarios.description: Set various parameter types (float, int, string, vector, color, bool) and verify they persist correctly in USD.
steps: Create a light node
Set float parameter (intensity)
Set color parameter (light color as RGB vector)
Set string parameter (texture path)
Set boolean parameter (normalize)
Read back each parameter and verify values match
scenarios.expected_outcome: All parameter types round-trip correctly through set/get

scenarios.title: Undo/Safety System
scenarios.description: Create nodes, make modifications, then test the undo system to verify rollback works.
steps: Query initial scene state
Create a new node
Verify node exists
Call undo
Verify node no longer exists
Query scene state matches initial
scenarios.expected_outcome: Undo correctly reverses the node creation

scenarios.title: Memory System Read/Write
scenarios.description: Write a memory entry, read it back, verify persistence within the session.
steps: Save a memory entry with key-value data
Read the entry back
Verify the data matches what was written
Query memory for the entry by key
Verify query returns the correct entry
scenarios.expected_outcome: Memory system correctly persists and retrieves data within session

scenarios.title: Full Lighting Setup + Render
scenarios.description: Build a complete lighting setup: dome light for environment, key light, fill light, rim light. Import geometry, assign material, render preview.
steps: Create sphere geometry via SOP Import
Create dome light with HDRI texture
Create distant light as key (intensity 1.2, warm color)
Create rect light as fill (intensity 0.4, cool color)
Create distant light as rim (intensity 0.8)
Create camera at appropriate distance
Set render resolution to 1920x1080
Set sample count for preview quality
Render a frame
Verify render output exists and is non-empty
scenarios.expected_outcome: Complete render with all lights contributing, correct resolution, no artifacts

scenarios.title: Multi-Material Scene
scenarios.description: Create three different objects, each with a unique MaterialX material, render to verify distinct appearances.
steps: Create three SOP geometries (sphere, box, torus)
Import all to LOPs
Create Material A: red metal (base_color red, metalness 1.0, roughness 0.2)
Create Material B: blue rubber (base_color blue, metalness 0.0, roughness 0.8)
Create Material C: green glass (transmission 0.9, IOR 1.5)
Assign each material to its corresponding geometry
Add dome light
Render frame
Verify all three material bindings exist
Verify render output exists
scenarios.expected_outcome: Three objects with visually distinct materials, all bindings valid

scenarios.title: USD Layer Composition
scenarios.description: Build a multi-layer USD scene: asset layer with geometry, material layer with materials, shot layer with overrides. Verify composition precedence.
steps: Create base asset layer with sphere geometry
Create material layer with MaterialX material
Create shot layer with intensity override on light
Compose layers in correct order
Verify shot layer opinions override asset layer
Inspect final composed stage
Verify no orphan prims or broken references
scenarios.expected_outcome: Clean USD composition with correct layer precedence, no errors

scenarios.title: SOP to LOP Pipeline
scenarios.description: Full SOP-to-LOP pipeline: create geometry in SOPs, add attributes, import to LOPs, apply materials, set up camera and lights, render.
steps: Create procedural geometry in SOPs (mountain terrain)
Add Cd attribute (vertex color) in SOPs
Create SOP Import LOP to bring geometry into stage
Apply MaterialX material using Cd as base color
Create camera looking at terrain
Add dome light
Set render settings
Render frame
Verify attribute transfer from SOP to LOP
Verify material uses transferred attribute
scenarios.expected_outcome: Complete SOP→LOP pipeline with attribute transfer and material assignment rendering correctly

scenarios.title: Render Settings Validation
scenarios.description: Configure various render settings (resolution, samples, pixel filter, AOVs) and verify they take effect in the render output.
steps: Create minimal render scene
Set resolution to 1280x720
Set pixel samples to 64
Configure AOVs (beauty, diffuse, specular, depth)
Read back render settings to verify they match
Render a frame
Verify output resolution matches setting
Verify AOV outputs were generated
scenarios.expected_outcome: All render settings correctly applied and reflected in output

scenarios.title: Error Recovery Workflow
scenarios.description: Deliberately trigger errors in a multi-step workflow and verify SYNAPSE's safety system handles them correctly.
steps: Create a valid scene (geometry + light + camera)
Create a checkpoint
Attempt to set an invalid parameter value
Verify error is reported cleanly
Verify scene state is not corrupted
Attempt to create a node with invalid type
Verify error is reported cleanly
Verify scene state still matches checkpoint
Continue with valid operations to confirm recovery
scenarios.expected_outcome: Errors caught cleanly, scene never corrupted, recovery successful

scenarios.title: Complete Shot Assembly
scenarios.description: Full cross-department shot assembly: Layout places assets, Lookdev adds materials, Lighting sets up rig, render validates output.
steps: [LAYOUT] Create scene with ground plane and 3 objects at different positions
[LAYOUT] Set up camera with appropriate framing
[LOOKDEV] Create 3 distinct MaterialX materials
[LOOKDEV] Assign materials to objects
[LOOKDEV] Verify all bindings resolve correctly
[LIGHTING] Create dome light + 3-point rig
[LIGHTING] Adjust intensities for scene balance
[RENDER] Set production render settings
[RENDER] Render frame
[SUPERVISOR] Evaluate: all objects visible, materials distinct, lighting balanced
[PRODUCER] Time the entire pipeline, compute friction ratio
scenarios.expected_outcome: Production-quality render from a multi-department assembly with clean USD composition

scenarios.title: Parametric Stress Test
scenarios.description: Run a single tool call (set_parameter) with 20 different parameter variations to find edge cases.
steps: Create a light node as test subject
Set texture path to: empty, valid, nonexistent, unicode, very long, spaces
For each variation: record success/failure and resulting parameter value
Identify which edge cases break and which are handled gracefully
scenarios.expected_outcome: Clear map of which parameter edge cases are handled vs. which break
